description: Single-event reference hook for Notification. Fires when Claude wants to alert the user (e.g. tool-permission prompts); appends a timestamped marker plus the full hook JSON payload (read from stdin) to /tmp/hook-fired-notification.log.

hooks.command: p="$(cat)"; { echo "$(date -u +%FT%TZ) notification fired"; echo "$p"; echo; } >> /tmp/hook-fired-notification.log
